description_long: This billiard table features a rectangular playing surface covered in green felt, bordered by dark brown wooden rails with metallic corner protectors. Six netted pockets are evenly distributed at each corner and the midpoints of the longer sides, with visible mesh netting for ball collection. The table stands on four sturdy, black legs, each with a simple, angular design and reinforced by a horizontal support beam at each end. The playing surface is marked with faint lines, including a semicircular arc and a straight line, likely for game setup or scoring. The rail cushions are integrated into the wooden frame and appear to be covered in the same dark material as the rails, with no visible branding or markings. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible wear, stains, or damage to the felt or structure.
description: A rectangular billiard table with green felt, dark brown wooden rails, metallic corner protectors, and six netted pockets. Supported by four black angular legs and featuring clean, marked playing surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long side of the table, three visible netted pockets, and the angular black legs.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the table's width, two corner pockets, and the horizontal support beam between the legs.
description_view_2: Rear long side view mirroring the front, with three netted pockets and clear view of the leg structure.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, showing the other short side, two corner pockets, and the support beam.
attribute_pocket_openings: Six round pocket openings, one at each corner and one at the midpoint of each long side, all open and fitted with white mesh netting. Corner and side pockets appear similar in size.
attribute_rail_cushions: Rail cushions are integrated into the dark brown wooden rails, with a smooth, matte finish and no visible branding or markings. The profile is standard and the condition appears excellent, with no visible wear.
attribute_leg_design: Four black, angular legs with a rectangular cross-section, arranged at each corner and connected by a horizontal support beam at each end. The design is simple and functional, with no decorative elements.
attribute_felt_covering: The playing surface is covered in green felt, which appears smooth, clean, and free of visible wear, seams, or branding. The felt is standard and in excellent condition.
